content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

January 7, 1992

Samuel Siegel  
City Attorney, City of Pico Rivera  
3610 Long Beach Blvd., Second Floor  
Long Beach, CA 90807

Re: Our Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-91-539

Dear Mr. Siegel:

This is in response to your letter requesting confirmation of telephone advice I provided to you on November 25, 1991 regarding the responsibilities of City of Pico Rivera Councilmember Rick L. Mercado, Sr., under the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 You correctly summarized the advice I provided to you.

I explained to you that Councilmember Mercado is not precluded from representing the City of Pico Rivera on the Joint Powers Authority/coalition of surrounding cities to implement a strategy to contain contaminated ground water in the San Gabriel Valley. I also explained that since Councilmember Mercado's wife is a member of the Pico Water District (the "District"), and receives payments for the meetings she attends, the District is a source of income to Councilmember Mercado for purposes of Section 87103(c) of the Act. As a result, Councilmember Mercado may have to determine whether a particular governmental decision would have a disqualifying financial effect on the Pico Water District. I also advised you that since any benefit flowing to the District would inure to the benefit of the customers of the District, and since the District served more than 50% of the City of Pico Rivera, that the financial effect of the decisions on the Pico Water District would not be distinguishable from the effect on the public generally.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

I trust this letter provides you with the confirmation you requested. If you have any further questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Jeevan S. Ahuja
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JSA:aa
